name: codearena
description: CodeArena — an online judge with Docker-sandboxed C++/Python/Java execution.
author: Sarvagya Sharma <sarvagya101@gmail.com> (https://github.com/sarvagya101)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace frontend"
